shop_items.name: Video Shoutout
shop_items.description: You are controlling what I say. I shout out your name and a sentence or two.  Keeep it family friendly! I use my discretion here; If it's bad, your order will get rejected!

shop_items.name: Custom Level Badge Design
shop_items.description: You can design a badge for a specific level that users reach with XP via the Reflex Bot.  Badge must be 64 * 64 pixels for discord. After purchasing this, you can DM me with your image. Requires my approval. If your design is offensive, I reserve the right to reject your order.  First come, first serve; only 50 total levels exist.  Once all badges have been designed, this item is gone forever! This is your chance to leave a lasting impact on the Nerfed Reflexes community.
